error_signature: Bad Request: wrong file_id or the file is temporarily unavailable
title: Telegram Get File node error due to credential mismatch
symptom: When attempting to retrieve a file using the Telegram Get File node, n8n returns a 'Bad Request: wrong file_id or the file is temporarily unavailable' error.
applies_when: Different credentials for sending and retrieving files
not_this_if: Using the same bot credentials for both sending and retrieving files
root_cause: The error occurs because the file is being sent by one bot but is being requested by another bot with different credentials. Telegram requires that the same bot that sends the file must also be used to retrieve it.
fix_steps: Ensure that the same bot credentials are used for both sending and retrieving files.
Check the credentials in the Telegram Get File node settings.
Save the changes and try executing the workflow again.
agent_instruction: Use the same bot credentials for both the sending and retrieving actions in Telegram.
